canonical_definition: A question answering dataset in the finance domain designed to support compositional reasoning by encoding hierarchical table structures for multi-step questions.
papers: SocioBench: Modeling Human Behavior in Sociological Surveys with Large Language Models
Training a Utility-based Retriever Through Shared Context Attribution for Retrieval-Augmented Language Models
